text-anchor: middle; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text.tspan: Управление политиками: CRUD и переключение активности.

text.style: text-anchor: middle; font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text-anchor: middle; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text-anchor: middle; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text.tspan: Чтение доступов студента и объяснение блокировки.

text.style: text-anchor: middle; font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text-anchor: middle; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text-anchor: middle; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text-anchor: middle; font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text-anchor: middle; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text-anchor: middle; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text-anchor: middle; font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text-anchor: middle; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text-anchor: middle; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text-anchor: middle; font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text-anchor: middle; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;

text-anchor: middle; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text-anchor: middle; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text.tspan: Создание и обновление политик с предварительной проверкой.

text.style: text-anchor: middle; font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text-anchor: middle; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text-anchor: middle; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text.tspan: Чтение из кэша, фоновый перерасчёт, объяснение блокировок.

text.style: text-anchor: middle; font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text-anchor: middle; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text-anchor: middle; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text.tspan: Запись факта, запуск каскадной агрегации, фоновый пересчёт.

text.style: text-anchor: middle; font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text-anchor: middle; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text-anchor: middle; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text.tspan: Полная верификация курса по пяти свойствам.

text.style: text-anchor: middle; font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text-anchor: middle; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text-anchor: middle; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text.tspan: Прогон сценариев на изолированной копии состояния.

text.style: text-anchor: middle; font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text-anchor: middle; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text-anchor: middle; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text.tspan: Каскадная агрегация завершённости вверх по иерархии.

text.style: text-anchor: middle; font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text-anchor: middle; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text-anchor: middle; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text.tspan: Импорт из СДО, нормализация форматов, автозапуск верификации.

text.style: text-anchor: middle; font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text-anchor: middle; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text-anchor: middle; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text.tspan: Загрузка, сохранение, операции над TBox и ABox.

text.style: text-anchor: middle; font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text-anchor: middle; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text-anchor: middle; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text.tspan: Конвейер логического вывода: подготовка фактов, Pellet, cwa-enforcement, материализация.

text.style: text-anchor: middle; font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text-anchor: middle; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text-anchor: middle; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text.tspan: Граф зависимостей split-node, поиск циклов, недостижимость.

text.style: text-anchor: middle; font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text-anchor: middle; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text-anchor: middle; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; font-family: "Open Sans", sans-serif;
text.tspan: Чтение, запись и инвалидация решений о доступе.
